title: polygonum pauciflorum
intro: Polygonum pauciflorum, also known as Yin chen, is a type of plant native to China that belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Yin chen is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, Yin chen is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being incorporated into traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
